description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsBlue bag with gold hardware and two short handlesHas a zipped main compartment with two pouches, a zipped separator and a zipped pocketHas a zipped pocket at the back and a concealed zipped pocket in the frontHas a detachable, adjustable shoulder strapMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 26 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 17 cm
